name: Amazon DynamoDB Table
description: Represents an Amazon DynamoDB table with its associated configuration, key schema, throughput settings, indexes, and metadata.

tableArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that uniquely identifies the table

tableStatus.description: The current state of the table

creationDateTime.description: The date and time when the table was created

keySchema.description: The primary key structure for the table, consisting of one or two key elements

attributeDefinitions.description: An array of attributes that describe the key schema for the table and indexes

billingMode.description: Controls how you are charged for read and write throughput

itemCount.description: The number of items in the table (updated approximately every six hours)

tableSizeBytes.description: The total size of the table in bytes (updated approximately every six hours)

globalSecondaryIndexes.description: The global secondary indexes, if any, on the table

localSecondaryIndexes.description: The local secondary indexes, if any, on the table

KeySchemaElement.description: Represents a single element of a key schema, specifying the attribute name and its role

attributeName.description: The name of a key attribute

keyType.description: The role that this key attribute will assume (HASH for partition key, RANGE for sort key)

KeySchemaElement.name: KeySchemaElement

AttributeDefinition.description: Represents an attribute for describing the key schema for the table and indexes

attributeType.description: The data type for the attribute (S=String, N=Number, B=Binary)

AttributeDefinition.name: AttributeDefinition

ProvisionedThroughput.description: Represents the provisioned throughput settings for the table

readCapacityUnits.description: The maximum number of strongly consistent reads consumed per second

writeCapacityUnits.description: The maximum number of writes consumed per second

lastIncreaseDateTime.description: The date and time of the last provisioned throughput increase

lastDecreaseDateTime.description: The date and time of the last provisioned throughput decrease

numberOfDecreasesToday.description: The number of provisioned throughput decreases for this table during this UTC calendar day

ProvisionedThroughput.name: ProvisionedThroughput

GlobalSecondaryIndex.description: Represents the properties of a global secondary index

indexName.description: The name of the global secondary index

keySchema.description: The complete key schema for the global secondary index

indexStatus.description: The current state of the global secondary index

indexSizeBytes.description: The total size of the index in bytes

itemCount.description: The number of items in the index

indexArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the index

GlobalSecondaryIndex.name: GlobalSecondaryIndex

LocalSecondaryIndex.description: Represents the properties of a local secondary index

indexName.description: The name of the local secondary index

keySchema.description: The complete key schema for the local secondary index

indexSizeBytes.description: The total size of the index in bytes

itemCount.description: The number of items in the index

indexArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the index

LocalSecondaryIndex.name: LocalSecondaryIndex

Projection.description: Represents attributes that are copied from the table into an index

projectionType.description: The set of attributes that are projected into the index

nonKeyAttributes.description: The non-key attributes that are projected into the index

Projection.name: Projection

StreamSpecification.description: Represents the DynamoDB Streams configuration for the table

streamEnabled.description: Indicates whether DynamoDB Streams is enabled on the table

streamViewType.description: Determines the information that is written to the stream

StreamSpecification.name: StreamSpecification

SSEDescription.description: The description of the server-side encryption status on the table

status.description: The current state of server-side encryption

kmsMasterKeyArn.description: The ARN of the KMS key used for SSE-KMS encryption

SSEDescription.name: SSEDescription
